items.claim: Felipe Franco has a cardio issue that causes him to tire by the third round.
items.quote: Felipe Franco, who I do think has a cardio issue, is probably going to start to tire a little bit by that third round.

items.claim: Felipe Franco's takedown defense is a significant question mark.
items.quote: there are big question marks about whether Franco can get the wrestling going here.

items.claim: Felipe Franco is showing improvement and evolving as a fighter in each appearance.
items.quote: every fight they're going to show up as a different version. He's improving.

items.claim: Alvin Hines has a wrestling background.
items.quote: Hines does have a wrestling background.

items.claim: Alvin Hines possesses a durable chin capable of absorbing flush strikes from high-level strikers.
items.quote: Hines has shown a cast iron chin. Denise was hitting him flush. He took those.

items.claim: Alvin Hines's primary path to victory is outlasting opponents who have suspect gas tanks.
items.quote: he's got a pretty good ability to just outlast guys.

items.claim: RJ Harris has a history of being finished by head kicks in amateur competition.
items.quote: he did eat like a headkick in an amateur fight. So it's like he's undefeated at 5 and0. But like it was a pretty ugly um spot... he got flatlined

items.claim: RJ Harris lacks experience and may struggle with the pressure of a UFC debut on short notice.
items.quote: he has five pro fights and he's now making his UFC debut on short notice. It just feels like the moment's going to be a little bit heavy.
